title: Toledo Frog Mural
description: A vibrant, large-scale mural featuring colorful blue and green tree frogs painted on the side of a building in downtown Toledo.

title: All You Need Is Love
description: A colorful mural located at Peace Love Happiness World Headquarters in downtown Toledo.

title: Glass City River Wall
description: The largest mural in North America, spanning 28 ADM grain silos across 170,000 sq ft along the Maumee River. Features sunflowers and portraits of Native American women and children honoring the region's first agriculturalists. Photo: Doug Hinebaugh.

title: Greetings from Toledo
description: A colorful postcard-style mural at 120 Main St in East Toledo, featuring iconic Toledo landmarks like Tony Packo's, the Skyway Bridge, and the Toledo Mud Hens. Photo: Doug Hinebaugh.

title: Toledo Museum of Art
description: World-class art museum with free admission, housed in a stunning Greek Revival building. Home to the renowned Glass Pavilion. 2445 Monroe St, Toledo, OH 43620. Photo: Doug Hinebaugh.

title: 20 North Gallery
description: Toledo's oldest independent art gallery, founded in 1993. Located in the historic Warehouse District at 18 N. St. Clair St, Toledo, OH 43604. Photo: Kenny Greene.

title: Collingwood Arts Center
description: A historic arts hub since 1905 offering artist studios, live performances, classes, and workshops. 2413 Collingwood Blvd, Toledo, OH 43620. Photo: Smithr1981, CC BY 3.0.

title: River House Arts
description: A full-service gallery in the historic Secor Building downtown, with free, ever-changing exhibitions.

title: Echo
description: Eleven rings from a former steam plant smokestack create a pathway through the landscape — a metaphor for Toledo's transition from past to present to future. Photo: Doug Hinebaugh.

title: Upon Reflection
description: Two suspended ovals — one mirrored, one backlit — play off sunlight by day and glow with LEDs by night. 310 N Summit St. Photo: Doug Hinebaugh.

title: Various Paintings by Dean Davis
description: A rotating collection of mixed-media paintings and works by Toledo muralist Dean Davis, displayed at The Loft. 336 N Superior Ave, Toledo, OH.

title: Ye Olde Cock & Bull
description: Hand-painted pub mural at Ye Olde Cock & Bull, 9 N Huron St, Toledo, OH 43604.
